mnemonics: B.A.R.K. - Books, Articles, Repositories, Knowledge: The resources you need to learn about the chain (blockchain)
keyPoints: Focus on foundational whitepapers, like Satoshi Nakamoto's Bitcoin paper.
Utilize interactive online tutorials and sandbox environments for hands-on practice.
Engage with official documentation from major platforms (e.g., Ethereum, Hyperledger).
commonMistakes: Relying solely on YouTube videos or social media posts without verifying information against official sources.
Attempting to build complex projects without first mastering the core concepts of cryptography and distributed systems.
Confusing different blockchain consensus mechanisms (e.g., Proof of Work vs. Proof of Stake) when studying various platforms.
